logic_depth_estimate.worst_path: AXI4-Lite address decode + 32-to-1 register array MUX in rsa_modexp_top

constraint_violations.description: Reset port named 'rst_n' but spec.json requires port name 'rst' with sync_active_high reset_type
Uses async active-low reset 'always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)' but spec.json requires synchronous active-high reset 'always @(posedge clk) if (rst)'
dsp_mac_32 instantiated with .rst_n(rst_n) but dsp_mac_32 port is named 'rst' not 'rst_n' — port binding mismatch will cause compilation error

COMPUTE_M state computes m_factor = t_rd_data_i * n_prime_i, but t_rd_data_i contains stale data from CARRY1 read (t[32]), not t[0]. Need 1-cycle wait for t[0] read to complete before computing m_factor.

functional_gaps.description: reg_N, reg_E, reg_R2, reg_M, reg_A, reg_Result arrays not reset — acceptable for data-path registers written before read
RAM arrays (ram_op_a, ram_op_b, ram_n, ram_t, ram_result) not initialized — acceptable, initialized via write port before use

recommendation: Fix mont_word_engine.v: change reset to sync-active-high (rename rst_n->rst, change always block to posedge clk only, fix dsp_mac_32 port binding), and fix COMPUTE_M state to wait 1 cycle for t[0] read before computing m_factor.
